column1: # Words where the word-final ى is a genuine Alef Maqsura and must be
# Rule source: CODA-TUN §5.2.1, COTA 2.0 "Alif Maqsura vs Final Ya" rule,
# NOTA §4 — keep MSA Alef Maqsura spelling for words with MSA cognates.
# Criterion: the MSA cognate word ends in Alef Maqsura (ى), meaning the
# root ends in ي/و and the word pattern ends in an open syllable.
# Format: single column — the word form that must keep ى
